title: Sankalp Garib Kalyan Yojana Landing Page

requirements.summary: Build fixed top navigation header with logo, navigation links, phone number, and Register button
acceptanceCriteria: Header is fixed at the top and remains visible on scroll.
Logo renders correctly in the header.
Navigation links scroll smoothly to their respective sections.
Phone number 7562038551 is clickable as a tel: link.
Register button is visible and styled with orange background and rounded-full shape.

file_operations.description: Create a fixed navigation header component with the generated Sankalp Marg Foundation logo (using frontend/public/assets/generated/sankalp-logo.dim_256x256.png), navigation links (Home, Scheme Info, Contact), clickable phone number (tel:7562038551) in orange, and an orange rounded-full Register button. Apply fixed positioning, white/95 background with backdrop-blur, and shadow-sm styling.
Import and render the Header component at the top of the application layout to ensure it appears on all pages.

requirements.summary: Build full-width hero section with orange gradient, headline, CTAs, and hero image
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section is two-column on desktop and stacked on mobile.
Headline, badge, description, and both CTA buttons are rendered.
'Apply Now' button is orange; 'Call Now' button is green and links to tel:7562038551.
Hero image is displayed with rounded corners and shadow.

file_operations.description: Create a hero section component with orange-to-white gradient background (from-orange-50 to-white). Left column: 'Sankalp Marg Foundation' badge, large headline 'A New Pledge for the Poor — Sankalp Garib Kalyan Yojana', supporting paragraph about free education, healthcare, and employment training, orange 'Apply Now' CTA button, and green 'Call Now' button (linking to tel:7562038551). Right column: display the generated hero image using frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-community.dim_800x600.png with rounded corners and shadow. Ensure responsive two-column layout on desktop and stacked on mobile.
Import and render the HeroSection component below the Header to display the hero content prominently on the landing page.

requirements.summary: Build services section with four service cards in responsive grid
acceptanceCriteria: All four service cards are rendered with correct icons, titles, and descriptions.
Cards are displayed in a 4-column grid on large screens, 2-column on medium, 1-column on small.
Hover effect changes border color to orange and scales the icon.

file_operations.description: Create a services section component titled 'Our Key Services' with a responsive grid (grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-8) containing four cards: (1) Free Healthcare with relevant Font Awesome icon in orange, title, and description about better treatment and free medicines; (2) Quality Education with icon, title, and description about free books and scholarships; (3) Farmer Welfare with icon, title, and description about financial and technical support; (4) Employment Mission with icon, title, and description about training and livelihood support for women. Apply hover effects that highlight border in orange and scale the icon.
Import and render the ServicesSection component below the HeroSection to display the key services offered by the foundation.

requirements.summary: Build dark footer with three columns: logo/tagline, quick links, and contact details
acceptanceCriteria: Footer has three columns on desktop, stacked on mobile.
All contact details (email, phone, address) are displayed with appropriate icons.
Email and phone are clickable links.
Copyright text is displayed at the bottom.

file_operations.description: Create a dark footer component (slate-900 background, white text) with three responsive columns: (1) Inverted white version of the logo with tagline about the foundation's commitment to the underprivileged; (2) Quick links section with Home, Scheme Info, Privacy Policy; (3) Contact details with icons — clickable email link (vishalkumar841456@gmail.com), clickable phone link (tel:7562038551), and address (New Delhi, India). Include copyright line '© 2026 Sankalp Marg Foundation. All Rights Reserved.' at the bottom.
Import and render the Footer component at the bottom of the application layout to complete the page structure.

requirements.summary: Apply consistent visual theme with orange primary color, smooth scrolling, and hover transitions
acceptanceCriteria: Orange is used consistently for CTAs, icons, accents, and hover states.
Smooth scrolling is enabled when navigating to sections.
Typography is bold and legible throughout.
Rounded corners are applied uniformly to cards and buttons.

file_operations.description: Configure global styles to enable smooth scroll behavior (scroll-behavior: smooth), define orange (#ea580c) as the primary brand color using CSS custom properties, set bold typography defaults for headings, and establish base styling for rounded cards and buttons. Ensure consistent use of slate-900 for dark sections and white/slate-50 for light backgrounds.

Extend the Tailwind theme to include custom orange color (#ea580c) in the color palette, configure rounded corner utilities (rounded-3xl), and define transition utilities for smooth hover effects throughout the application.
